goal: Wire the hardened CUDA training handoff into v0 release blocker recertification next actions so the remaining real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint path points to the correct first external command.

blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates

Focused recertification tests verify the training handoff action ordering.
Host-access recertification refresh remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker.
No M6-RC GO or v0 release GO is claimed from current local artifacts.
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate improves next-action routing only; it does not accept evidence or relax readiness.
